creator: swhetzel@gmail.com
text:
On Wed, Nov 21, 2012 at 3:50 PM, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of audio/akode,
>
> Please note that PR ports/173777 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/173777
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org


The patch looks correct, go ahead and commit it.

Thanks

-- 
DISCLAIMER:

No electrons were mamed while sending this message. Only slightly bruised.
